question.text: An option has premium Rs. 0.30 and intrinsic value Rs. 0.20. What is the time value?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Time value = Premium - Intrinsic value = 0.30 - 0.20 = Rs. 0.10. **The Trap:** Time value is the RESIDUAL after subtracting intrinsic value from premium. **Cross-Exam Context:** Premium decomposition is tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** As expiry approaches, this Rs. 0.10 time value will decay to zero. At expiry, premium = intrinsic value only.
